Home › Volusia County › Port Orange › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Port Orange

Both halves check out across all 13 of these Port Orange restaurants: an A on the inspection and high marks from diners. CHICK-FIL-A grades a perfect 100/100.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 91 C
    CINNAMON TREE CAFE Cafe ★ 4.8 (1965) Port Orange · Volusia County VeganVeg +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 93 C
    COLD STONE CREAMERY Other ★ 4.8 (1793) Port Orange · Volusia County Nut-aware Inspected Jul 2025
